description: Sustainability reporting standards PB recognises as 'named framework' evidence for SFDR criterion 5 (pre-contractual disclosure, elements 4 and 6) and criterion 7 (periodic reporting). Used to discriminate between specific-named-framework content and generic ESG narrative.

standards.name: Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD) Recommendations
IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standard S1 (General Requirements)
IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standard S2 (Climate-related Disclosures)
CDP (formerly Carbon Disclosure Project) Climate / Water / Forests questionnaires

verification_note: The standards list is intentionally tight — adding a standard requires methodology-doc justification. Internal named frameworks (with version stamp) are also acceptable per the criterion 5/7 band text.
